summary: Tested user-requested features: 1) Recent Trips collapsible section (starts collapsed), 2) Back to Top button. All 5 features verified working correctly.

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <tr> cannot be a child of <span>' - hydration error in employees table. This is a minor React warning, not breaking functionality.

recent_trips_starts_collapsed.details: showMileageEntries defaults to false, Recent Trips section shows only header when Mileage Tracking is expanded

recent_trips_expandable.details: Clicking 'Recent Trips (11)' header expands section showing trip entries with purpose badges and mileage

recent_trips_collapsible.details: Clicking header again collapses section, hiding trip data

back_to_top_appears_on_scroll.details: Button appears when scrollY > 400px as expected

back_to_top_scrolls_to_top.details: Clicking button scrolls page from 600px to 0px smoothly

back_to_top_hides_after_scroll.details: Button is hidden again after page scrolls to top

critical_code_review_comments: Console hydration warning about <tr> inside <span> in employees table - should wrap dynamic content differently to avoid this warning

test_credentials.login_method: Enter code '4399' in email field on /login page

context_for_next_testing_agent: Recent Trips section uses showMileageEntries state (default false) in MileageTrackingSection.jsx. Back to Top button uses showBackToTop state triggered at scrollY > 400. The Emergent badge at bottom-right may overlap the Back to Top button - use JavaScript click or force=True when testing. Both features are working correctly. Data-testid for Back to Top: 'back-to-top-btn'. Recent Trips header has no data-testid but can be located via 'text=Recent Trips'.
